evolutionSummary: Project evolution: 107 issues and 37 PRs processed yielded 7 new fingerprints, all from JohanBendz#1380 (TZ3000 + TS0207 variants and generic placeholders). No issues closed or responses logged, indicating backlog accumulation and unvalidated requests. Action items: verify TZ3000+TS0207 sensor cluster compatibility (IASZone/PowerConfig), add concrete manufacturer mappings, retire placeholder “example/vision” entries, and enforce diagnostic uploads before onboarding. Focus on closing stale requests, validating driver assignments, and converting raw PRs into actionable driver updates or legacy anchors to prevent fragmentation.
